name: 🪙 waxwing
description: waxwing — self-custody Antelope wallet (WAX · EOS · Telos · XPR/Proton, testnet & mainnet, config-driven; default WAX testnet). v0.6.5: balance auto-refresh on tab-switch + visibility-gated poll (~45s), AtomicHub external link in NFT detail (WAX only). v0.6.4: marketplace UX overhaul. v0.6.3: tx history.

brand.note: Single source of truth is the BRAND const in index.js (the panel fetches /plugin/wax-wallet/brand). The `name` above is just the office-shelf label and mirrors BRAND.name.
brand.name: waxwing

commands.name: networks
commands.desc: List the configured networks (WAX · EOS · Telos · XPR/Proton, testnet/mainnet) + which is selected

commands.name: network
commands.desc: Show the currently selected network

commands.name: setnetwork
commands.desc: Switch network: wax-testnet | wax-mainnet | eos-testnet | eos-mainnet | telos-testnet | telos-mainnet | xpr-testnet | xpr-mainnet (default wax-testnet)

commands.name: chaininfo
commands.desc: Ping a network's RPC — chain id, head block, server version

commands.name: account
commands.desc: Look up an account on the selected network: balance + CPU/NET/RAM

commands.name: balance
commands.desc: Token balance (default eosio.token / core symbol of the selected chain)

commands.name: history
commands.desc: Recent transactions of an account (Hyperion v2)

commands.name: keyaccounts
commands.desc: Look up which on-chain accounts a public key controls (Hyperion get_key_accounts)

commands.name: nftassets
commands.desc: List NFT assets owned by an account from AtomicAssets (decoded immutable + mutable data + media)

commands.name: nftasset
commands.desc: Get one AtomicAssets asset by ID (decoded immutable + mutable data + media)

commands.name: nfthistory
commands.desc: AtomicAssets action history for one asset (mint/transfer/update/burn)

commands.name: nftcollections
commands.desc: List all AtomicAssets collections on the selected network

commands.name: nftschemas
commands.desc: List schemas for an AtomicAssets collection

commands.name: nfttemplates
commands.desc: List templates for an AtomicAssets collection (decoded immutable + media)

commands.name: nftcacheclear
commands.desc: Clear the in-memory AtomicAssets metadata cache

commands.name: transfernft
commands.desc: Build a sign-intent to transfer one or more AtomicAssets NFTs

commands.name: market-browse
commands.desc: Light Marketplace: browse active AtomicMarket sales (WAX testnet/mainnet) with filter/sort + decoded NFT media (CIDv0)

commands.name: market-listing
commands.desc: Light Marketplace: one AtomicMarket sale — full media + price + assets

commands.name: market-price
commands.desc: Light Marketplace: floor / average / median price from active listings

commands.name: market-list
commands.desc: Light Marketplace: build a sign-intent to LIST NFT(s) for sale (announcesale + createoffer) — user signs, no broadcast

commands.name: market-buy
commands.desc: Light Marketplace: build a sign-intent to BUY a sale (deposit + purchasesale) — user signs, no broadcast

commands.name: market-cancel
commands.desc: Light Marketplace: build a sign-intent to CANCEL a sale you listed (cancelsale) — user signs, no broadcast

commands.name: create
commands.desc: Generate a NEW keypair — auto-resolves on-chain accounts via Hyperion; single account→auto-bind, multiple→return list, none→manual setaccount

commands.name: import
commands.desc: Import a private key — auto-resolves on-chain accounts via Hyperion (same as create)

commands.name: accounts
commands.desc: List stored keys/accounts on the selected network (public info only — never private keys)

commands.name: overview
commands.desc: Multi-account dashboard: every stored account on the selected network with its OWN live balance + CPU/NET/RAM (each separate, not one combined blob)

commands.name: unlock
commands.desc: Decrypt key(s) into memory after verifying the password (auto-locks)

commands.name: lock
commands.desc: Wipe all decrypted keys from memory

commands.name: status
commands.desc: Wallet status: selected network, networks, stored accounts, locked/unlocked, brand

commands.name: setaccount
commands.desc: Bind a stored key to an on-chain account name / permission

commands.name: newaccount
commands.desc: Create a NEW on-chain account on the selected network, bound to a generated key (creator pays RAM+stake)

commands.name: select
commands.desc: Pick the active account (default sender) on the selected network

commands.name: send
commands.desc: Build a sign-intent for a transfer (from/to/quantity/memo) — returns a summary to confirm; does NOT broadcast yet

commands.name: confirm
commands.desc: Broadcast ANY pending sign-intent (transfer or resource) after the user taps Sign (requires unlocked wallet)

commands.name: cancel
commands.desc: Discard a pending sign-intent (transfer or resource; user dismissed the Sign popup)

commands.name: stake
commands.desc: Stake CPU/NET (delegatebw) {from,receiver?,cpu?,net?} — build a sign-intent; confirm broadcasts

commands.name: unstake
commands.desc: Unstake CPU/NET (undelegatebw) {from,receiver?,cpu?,net?} — ⚠️ tokens locked 3 days; confirm broadcasts

commands.name: buyram
commands.desc: Buy RAM {from,receiver?,bytes?|quantity?} — bytes=buyrambytes, else token spend; confirm broadcasts

commands.name: sellram
commands.desc: Sell unused RAM {from,bytes} — tokens back immediately; confirm broadcasts

commands.name: changepassword
commands.desc: Change wallet password — re-encrypts all keys (requires current password)

commands.name: remove
commands.desc: Delete a stored key from the keystore (current network)

commands.name: config
commands.desc: Show or set auto-lock duration in ms (min 30000, default 600000 = 10 min)

commands.name: export
commands.desc: Export the ENCRYPTED wallet (scrypt→AES-GCM, never plaintext) — safe to save as a backup file

commands.name: importwallet
commands.desc: Restore a wallet from an encrypted export blob — decrypts and merges byNet/accounts/selected

commands.name: brand
commands.desc: Return the brand name/logo (single source of truth)
